title: Insufficient test coverage for packet_hash standardization and metrics
description: test_simulation_validation.py only superficially checks 'packet_hashes' in JSON (line 147); no assertions on hash length (32 chars), TX/RX hash matching, cross-Python/Rust consistency, or sim_client.py hashes. Metrics.py _PACKET_HASH_SET_MAX_SIZE field in dataclass (line 37) is misused as self._ (should be class const). Tests pass but don't detect the SHA256[:16] bugs. Flag as new issue from codereview.
